THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEARD, WILLIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET #321, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-03-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY 5PM 12-3-96, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDE D JUDGMNT FOR $2250 BACK RENT & DMGS OF $10 PER DAY FROM 10- 1-96 THRU 12-3-96 PLUS $83 COSTS. GENERAL RELEASE. ANY PER- SONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. SEC SEPOSIT FORFEITED. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY.
